name: Marine Table Lamp - 21 Inch Height - TBL4041 - Blue/Charcoal - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the charming marine table lamp in blue and chrome. This exquisite piece combines sophisticated design with a touch of coastal elegance, making it an ideal addition to any decor. The blue and charcoal hues create a serene atmosphere, enhancing both traditional and modern interiors. Crafted with attention to detail, this lamp brings a harmonious blend of style and functionality to your living room, bedroom, or office. The vibrant finish complements the smooth chrome accents, resulting in a timeless look. Perfect for adding a splash of color and a hint of sparkle to any room, this lamp is designed to captivate and inspire. Elevate your home decor with the unique appeal of this elegant lighting accessory.
